t.t-if: o.partner_id.street or o.partner_id.street2 or o.partner_id.city or o.partner_id.state_id or o.partner_id.zip or o.partner_id.country_id

span.t-if: o.move_type == 'out_invoice' and o.state == 'posted' and not res_config.show_reg_no
o.move_type == 'out_invoice' and o.state == 'posted' and res_config.show_reg_no and not res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'
o.move_type == 'out_invoice' and o.state == 'posted' and res_config.show_reg_no and res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'

t.t-if: not res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_price and not res_config.show_quantity

t.t-elif: not res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_price and not res_config.show_quantity
not res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_price and not res_config.show_quantity
res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_price and not res_config.show_quantity
res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_price and not res_config.show_quantity
res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_price and res_config.show_quantity
res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_price and not res_config.show_quantity
res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_price and res_config.show_quantity
res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_price and not res_config.show_quantity
res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_price and res_config.show_quantity
not res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_price and res_config.show_quantity
res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_price and not res_config.show_quantity
res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_price and not res_config.show_quantity
res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_price and not res_config.show_quantity
res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_price and res_config.show_quantity
res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_price and res_config.show_quantity

tr.t-att-class: 'bg-200 font-weight-bold o_line_section' if line.display_type == 'line_section' else 'font-italic o_line_note' if line.display_type == 'line_note' else ''

t.t-if: len(o.line_ids.filtered(lambda line: line.tax_line_id)) in [0, 1] and o.amount_untaxed == amount_by_group[2]
len(o.line_ids.filtered(lambda line: line.tax_line_id)) in [0, 1] and o.amount_untaxed == amount_by_group[2]

div.p: Please use the following communication for your payment :

t.t-if: not o or not 'company_id' in o
o.company_id.city or o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.street2 or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.city or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.city or o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.street2 or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.city or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.city or o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.street2 or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.city or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
